productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Pink T-shirt
description: CompositionPink t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with a mock neckline that has snipped edges and pin tucks in the middle, short puff sleeves with mock cuffs that have snipped edges, pin tucks and graphic print on the frontFitComfortWash careWash, dry and iron inside outMachine wash cold at 30 degrees using a mild detergentDo not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry cleanDry flat in shadeCool iron, do not iron on decorationsFlaunt your feminine attitude in style with this stylish top from united colors of benetton. The graphic print of dressed up penguins on the front, coupled with the pin tucks and snipped edges adds an ultra-feminine vibe to the top. The soft cotton fabric keeps you comfy all day. Pair this top with jeans and heeled sandals for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
